name: stride-monorepo
description: A Bun monorepo for the Stride desktop app and future packages

scripts.typecheck: bun run prepare:google-calendar-config && bun run --cwd apps/desktop typecheck
scripts.start: bun run prepare:google-calendar-config && bun run --cwd apps/desktop start
scripts.dev: bun run prepare:google-calendar-config && bun run --cwd apps/desktop dev
scripts.build: bun run prepare:google-calendar-config && bun run --cwd apps/desktop build
scripts.build:unpack: bun run prepare:google-calendar-config && bun run --cwd apps/desktop build:unpack
scripts.build:win: bun run prepare:google-calendar-config && bun run --cwd apps/desktop build:win
scripts.build:mac: bun run prepare:google-calendar-config && bun run --cwd apps/desktop build:mac
scripts.build:linux: bun run prepare:google-calendar-config && bun run --cwd apps/desktop build:linux
